name: WiX Toolset
description: Open-source toolset for building Windows installation packages (MSI/MSIX) from XML source.

seo.title: WiX Toolset — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: WiX Toolset: Open-source toolset for building Windows installation packages (MSI/MSIX) from XML source.

when_to_use: XML-driven Windows MSI and MSIX package authoring
Complex installer logic with custom actions and conditions
Heat.exe for harvesting file system into WXS fragments
Bundle installer chaining multiple MSI prerequisites

pros: The standard for serious Windows MSI/MSIX installers
Full access to Windows Installer features
cons: XML authoring has a steep learning curve
Licensing/sponsorship story shifted in recent years
review.verdict: When you need real MSI/MSIX and enterprise deployment, WiX is still the right answer — just budget the ramp-up.
review.best_for: Enterprise Windows apps requiring MSI/MSIX and Group Policy deployment.
review.not_for: Indie apps where Inno Setup or Velopack are vastly simpler.
